findings.evidence_context: Quick Start: `export COMPANY_PP_CONTACT_EMAIL=user@example.com` — standards-reserved @example.com TLD (RFC 2606) used as a documentation placeholder telling users to substitute their real SEC contact email.
Troubleshooting (`### API-specific`): example `export COMPANY_PP_CONTACT_EMAIL=user@example.com` shown in the fix for exit code 4. RFC 2606 reserved domain used as documentation placeholder.

findings.note: SEC public CIK used as canonical normalization test fixture (TestNormalizeCIK)
findings.evidence_context: TestNormalizeCIK case `{"320193", "0000320193", false}` — Apple Inc's SEC EDGAR CIK (Central Index Key), a publicly published 10-digit issuer identifier (https://www.sec.gov/cgi-bin/browse-edgar?action=getcompany&CIK=0000320193). Not a phone number; the phone-us detector pattern matches any 10-digit run.

findings.note: SEC public CIK used as canonical normalization test fixture (TestNormalizeCIK)
findings.evidence_context: TestNormalizeCIK case `{"0000320193", "0000320193", false}` — Apple Inc's SEC CIK (the `want` column). Public issuer identifier; phone-us detector false-positive on 10-digit run.

findings.note: SEC public CIK used as canonical normalization test fixture (TestNormalizeCIK)
findings.evidence_context: TestNormalizeCIK case `{"0000320193", "0000320193", false}` — Apple Inc's SEC CIK (the `want` column). Public issuer identifier; phone-us detector false-positive on 10-digit run.

findings.note: SEC public CIK used as canonical normalization test fixture (TestNormalizeCIK)
findings.evidence_context: TestNormalizeCIK case `{"CIK0000320193", "0000320193", false}` — Apple Inc's SEC CIK with CIK prefix tested for stripping. Public issuer identifier.

findings.note: SEC public CIK used as canonical normalization test fixture (TestNormalizeCIK)
findings.evidence_context: TestNormalizeCIK case `{"cik320193", "0000320193", false}` — Apple Inc's SEC CIK (the normalized `want`). Public issuer identifier.

findings.note: SEC public CIK embedded in accession-number test fixture (TestNormalizeAccession)
findings.evidence_context: TestNormalizeAccession: input accession `"0000320193-22-000049"` — embedded CIK is Apple's public SEC identifier within a real-shaped EDGAR accession number used to test round-trip normalization.

findings.note: SEC public CIK embedded in accession-number test fixture (TestNormalizeAccession)
findings.evidence_context: TestNormalizeAccession: round-trip input `"000032019322000049"` (no-dashes form) — embedded Apple CIK as part of a canonical EDGAR accession-number normalization test fixture.
